overall.description: Cinematic game engine footage showing a spacecraft flying alongside a massive orange industrial space station, then transitioning through a warp to a debris field orbiting a gray planet. The clip features high-quality space rendering with detailed nebula effects and dynamic lighting from a distant star.

scene_state.functional_zone: deep space corridor alongside industrial megastructure

agents.ego_description: piloting the spacecraft steadily alongside the massive orange industrial structure, maintaining parallel course

entered.detail: Massive cylindrical space station with orange and red hull plating, covered in scaffolding, pipes, and industrial machinery
Scattered asteroids and small wreckage floating in the vicinity of the structure
Dark reddish-brown cosmic dust clouds creating a moody backdrop

segments.scene_description: The spacecraft flies steadily alongside a massive orange industrial megastructure in deep space. The hull of the station shows detailed scaffolding and machinery, while debris floats nearby against a backdrop of dark nebula clouds.

scene_state.functional_zone: open space with distant star illumination

events.description: bright star becomes visible on the right, casting strong light across the ship's hull
spacecraft banks sharply to the right, turning away from the industrial structure

agents.ego_description: banking the spacecraft to starboard, moving away from the structure toward open space and the bright star

entered.detail: Large bright celestial body that illuminates the scene with warm white light

segments.scene_description: The spacecraft banks right, turning away from the industrial station as a bright star emerges on the right horizon. The lighting shifts to a warmer tone as the ship moves into open space, leaving the megastructure behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense debris field orbiting planet Terminus

events.description: screen fades to black and transitions to a new location with a massive planet and dense asteroid field
text overlay appears identifying the location as Ruin Station (Planet Terminus)

agents.ego_description: navigating carefully through the dense asteroid field, avoiding collisions with large rocks and debris

entered.detail: Massive gray planet dominating the background with cratered surface and atmospheric haze
Thick field of rocky debris and boulders surrounding the flight path
Large wrecked space station or ship embedded among the asteroids with broken hull sections

segments.scene_description: After a brief fade to black, the scene transitions to a dense debris field orbiting the massive gray planet Terminus. The spacecraft maneuvers through thick asteroid clusters, passing the wreckage of Ruin Station while a text overlay identifies the location.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a close-range flight alongside an industrial megastructure into a journey through a distant planetary debris field. It begins with the spacecraft gliding steadily past the detailed scaffolding and machinery of a massive orange station set against dark nebula clouds. As the ship banks right, the scene opens into the void of space and the lighting shifts to a warmer tone as a bright star emerges on the horizon. Following a brief fade to black, the environment transforms into a dense field of asteroid clusters orbiting the massive gray planet Terminus. The camera finally maneuvers through this wreckage, passing the ruins of a destroyed station as a location overlay appears on screen.
